name: Cross-border social media creatives

defaults.lighting: natural window light, warm color tone
defaults.overlay: minimal English text badges and product benefit tags

overrides.composition: clean framing with clear visual hierarchy
overrides.overlay: short English hook, benefit tags, subtle engagement elements

overrides.platform: TikTok Shop / Reels thumbnail, vertical format
overrides.overlay: short hook, product card style badge, simple CTA, no fake platform logo

overrides.platform: Meta Ads product creative for cold traffic
overrides.composition: product-centered with lifestyle context and high readability
overrides.overlay: clear English headline, 2 benefit bullets, CTA button style without fake logo

overrides.platform: Pinterest vertical product pin, inspirational shopping style
overrides.composition: vertical product lifestyle layout with clean negative space
overrides.overlay: short headline and save-worthy visual cue

category_tips.beauty: show texture, skin-safe context, avoid medical claims
category_tips.food: appetizing composition, ingredient sourcing, avoid unsupported health claims
category_tips.fashion: fit, fabric, size context, real-person styling
category_tips.home: styled room corner, cozy atmosphere, scale reference
category_tips.electronics: hands-on use, ports/features accurate, avoid fake screen UI

examples: Instagram product lifestyle photo, iPhone 15 Pro look, {product} on {surface}, clean natural window light, slight real-life imperfection, English headline in reserved negative space, premium DTC aesthetic, 1080x1350px, no fake logo, no watermark
TikTok Shop vertical product cover. {product} in real use, phone-shot UGC feel, short English hook, product benefit badge, subtle product card style, 1080x1920px, authentic not over-polished

Meta ad product creative. {product} as focal point, lifestyle background, clear English headline, two benefit bullets, CTA-style button, mobile-first readability, 1080x1080px, no trademarked platform UI
anti_ai_tips: Specify phone model and natural imperfections. Add slight noise, real shadows, not perfectly centered. Use 'authentic phone-shot look, not over-polished, not plastic-smooth'.
